mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, mechanically boosting S&P 500 valuations over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid acceleration in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor demand, triggering recession fears that compress equity multiples and drive negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in residential construction starts and consumer credit outstanding indicate synchronized housing and consumption demand expansion, which lifts corporate earnings expectations and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint signal produces negative forward returns in > 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production exceeds 105, it confirms robust manufacturing capacity utilization, which reduces input cost pressures and supports near-term equity risk premiums, yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are statistically indistinguishable from zero when INDPRO > 105 over a 2-year test period.

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation coinciding with accommodative policy signals a loss of central bank credibility, forcing a repricing of long-duration assets and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns with statistical significance (p > 0.10) over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Sequential quarterly growth in real GDP expands the corporate earnings base, which mechanically supports higher equity valuations and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Strong nonfarm payroll growth combined with a stable or falling unemployment rate confirms labor market tightness without overheating, which sustains consumer spending power and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal produces negative forward returns in > 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in housing starts signals weakening aggregate demand and rising default risks, which compresses financial sector valuations and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not significantly lower than baseline when the trigger activates (t-test p > 0.05).
